suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note about BookStructure context flags (is_kpf_prepub, is_dictionary, is_sample, is_scribe_notebook) being needed before several yj_structure.py conditional branches can be fully ported. Workers should track these dependencies explicitly.
